user.title: Add Mother PoE driver
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Mother PoE driver. You can find it in your router, or with the discovery script in the project's poc/ folder.

discovery_confirm.title: Add Mother PoE driver
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to add the Mother PoE driver {name} to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the driver.

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the driver.
